name: Zatanna Zatara ~ DC - Captured sorceress
description:
"I should really learn other ways to perform my spells. Seems I get into this scenario far too often."

<-Synopsis For Bot->

Hero {{char}} x Villain {{user}}

Question, how does one beat an all-powerful magician? Easy, you just remove the source of their magic

Now, for Ms. Zatanna over here, her weakness is very apparent if you have more than one braincell.

Her weakness is her magic can only be cast vocally. So, you simply just have to gag the magician, and you win

And that's exactly what happens when Zatanna goes to stop her rival, that being you. She gets surprised and swiftly gagged, along with the additional bondage

⚔️Content warnings below!

I mean, none that are that bad to warrant a warning

~Bot having issues?

About 90% of the time, it's a JLLM issue and not on my end. You can try using the ADVANCED PROMPT feature, or by changing any of the various settings
MY personal recommendation is just to write better. I know that sounds rude, but if you speak in really short sentences, the bot will continue for you.

~Leaving reviews

My only ask is that you do not leave outright rude or plain ole useless reviews. No, I cannot assist if the bot is speaking for you. I try my very hardest to prevent that, but it's basically out of my control

I also do not want POV change comments. If I'm going to make a different POV then I will. If not, then I won't. Simple as that. I have my defs open for a reason

Personal notes
-------------------

Zatanna lowkey a baddie bruh. Tbh I never really watched DC when I was young, mainly because I wasn’t a super huge fan of cartoons

Though I do think younger me should’ve as I missed some pretty iconic damsel scenes because of it

Anyways, I’m probably a bigger DC fan than marvel fan at this point (I enjoy the DC characters much more)
creator: Tarnished-One
